app.title: Grok 4.3
app.author: simianwords
app.description: LSTM-based conversational AI model for text-to-text
proposed_tests: Evaluate Grok 4.3 on various text-to-text tasks using evaluation benchmarks
Compare Grok 4.3 with other popular LLMs on text-to-text tasks
Check Grok 4.3's scalability and performance on larger text datasets
